data.content: The source project is missing implicit usings. Let me fix the csproj files so the project compiles.
data.reasoningText:
The source project is missing `ImplicitUsings`. Let me check the csproj more carefully - it doesn't have `<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>`. Let me add the missing using directive to the source file, or better yet, update the csproj. Actually, I shouldn't modify the source file - this is likely an issue with the project file. Let me add ImplicitUsings to both csproj files.

Wait, actually the task says "Don't fix pre-existing issues unrelated to your task." But the source doesn't compile. Let me just add the using to the source file as a minimal fix, or update the csproj.


I'll add `<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>` to both csproj files - that's the minimal fix needed to get the source compiling without modifying the actual source code.
